arts.ttl: Freiburg vs. Wolfsburg preview: Visitors targeting another win
arts.sum: Wolfsburg will look to claim a sixth consecutive victory in all competitions when they travel to the Europa-Park Stadion for Friday’s Bundesliga clash with Freiburg.
Germany's Kicker Magazine reports that VfL Wolfsburg have interest in picking up Freiburg fullback Kiliann Sildillia.

arts.ttl: Preview: Freiburg vs. Wolfsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Bundesliga clash between Freiburg and Wolfsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
